title: Price's Candles Tapered Dinner Candles Green Unscented Wax Pack of 50 | 7 Hour Burn Time Elegant Long Candles for Home Decor, Events, Celebrations & Dining
features: Elegant Evergreen Tapered Candles for Events: Enhance your decor with these stylish evergreen dinner candles, perfect for festive tables, ceremonies, and year-round ambiance in any interior setting.
Long-Lasting Burn Time for Extended Use: Each candle offers up to 7 hours of steady burn, making them ideal for dinners, weddings, and events that require long-lasting candlelight.
Unscented Design for Versatile Environments: Crafted to be unscented, these taper candles are suitable for dining areas, indoor spaces, and occasions where fragrance-free ambiance is preferred.
Fits Standard Holders for Easy Placement: Made to complement most traditional candle holders, these tapered wax candles are perfect for table centerpieces, altars, or decorative displays.
Bulk Set of 50 for Home and Professional Use: Includes a generous pack of 50 evergreen candles, suitable for home decor, party planners, hospitality venues, and seasonal or festive celebrations.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Trim wick to 1/4 inch before lighting, keep out of drafts, and store in a cool, dry place.
